_comment: Same host node, but the object dictionary is imported from the CANopenNode / CANopenEditor JSON export (od/DS301_profile.json, exported from CANopenNode's example DS301 profile). 'include' filters the index ranges shown; $NODEID defaults resolve against node_id. The init script enables the CANopen producer heartbeat via 0x1017.
name: DS301 Geraet
description: Object dictionary from CANopenNode JSON export, driven by Rhai scripts

scripts.name: status
script: print("uptime=" + uptime_ms() / 1000 + "s error_register=" + od_read(0x1001, 0) + " hb=" + od_read(0x1017, 0) + "ms");
